top_signals.title: Satoshi’s 1.1 million bitcoin and millions more can be saved from quantum attack, says expert
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: UK plans for cybercrime law reform would protect almost no one, experts warn
top_signals.summary: The proposals would require researchers to cease activity the moment a vulnerability is identified, meaning they could not confirm it was real, assess its severity or determine its exploitability.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
